mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.`perms` FROM user_role ur LEFT JOIN `role` r ON ur.`role_id` = r.`id` AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN `role_menu` rm ON ur.`role_id` = rm.`role_id` AND rm.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN `menu` m ON(m.`id` = rm.`menu_id` OR r.`name` = 'admin') WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.is_delete = 0 AND m.`status` = 1
